description: The percentage labels on the pie slices are formatted inconsistently: one slice shows no decimal places (e.g., "60%"), another shows two decimal places (e.g., "19.20%"), another shows three decimal places (e.g., "15.600%"), and they appear in dramatically different font sizes (ranging from 8pt to 18pt). This makes the chart look haphazard and makes it difficult to quickly compare the values across slices.
